JAMB.what is jamb: JAMB (Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board) is the Nigerian standardized test for university admissions. It tests subjects: English, Mathematics, and two others.
JAMB.jamb registration: To register for JAMB: 1) Create account on jamb.org.ng 2) Pay registration fee (₦3,500) 3) Fill your form 4) Choose exam date
JAMB.jamb subjects: JAMB subjects include: English Language, Mathematics, Chemistry, Biology, Physics, Economics, Government, History, etc. You choose 4 subjects.

WAEC.what is waec: WAEC (West African Examinations Council) conducts WASSCE - a qualification for secondary school completion in West Africa.
WAEC.waec registration: WAEC registration is done through your school. You must be in SS3 (Final year) to sit WAEC exams.
WAEC.waec subjects: WAEC includes core subjects (English, Math, Integrated Science) and electives (History, Geography, Economics, etc.)

NECO.what is neco: NECO (National Examination Council) conducts NECO exams - an alternative to WAEC for secondary school certification.
NECO.neco registration: NECO registration is usually done through registered NECO centers or your school between specific periods.
NECO.neco subjects: NECO examines similar subjects to WAEC including English, Math, Sciences, and various electives.

ICAN.what is ican: ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria) professional qualification for accountants.
ICAN.ican registration: Requirements: O-level results, JAMB UTME score or ND/HND, and registration with ICAN.
ICAN.ican levels: ICAN has multiple levels: PE I, PE II, ACA (Final) leading to professional accounting qualification.

CIPM.what is cipm: CIPM (Chartered Institute of Personnel Management) professional qualification for HR professionals.
CIPM.cipm registration: Entry requirements: O-level results, university degree or equivalent professional qualification.
CIPM.cipm certification: CIPM offers modules in HR Management, Organizational Development, and Employee Relations.

AWS.what is aws: AWS (Amazon Web Services) cloud computing platform with certifications: Cloud Practitioner, Solutions Architect, Developer.
AWS.aws certification: AWS offers certifications at different levels: Foundational, Associate, and Professional for cloud career.
AWS.aws study: Study AWS using official training, practice exams, and hands-on labs. AWS provides free tier for practice.
